'''Larith De''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] itinerant aristocrat representing [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. He traveled around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to represent his homeworld, along with his wife, [[Deel De]]. But De was little more than a puppet of his wife. His sociable and bumbling demeanor was a cover for his wife's more sinister actions.
